lineup_source: Curaçao vs Ecuador, Group draw, 20 June 2026 (0-0); XI inferred from most-capped regulars in each position from the 26-man 2026 World Cup squad

players.name: Eloy Room
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; explicitly eligible for Curaçao through his father. Mother's origin not documented, assumed Curaçaoan.

players.name: Juriën Gaari
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; plays for Curaçao but no specific parental heritage documented, assumed Curaçaoan descent.

players.name: Sherel Floranus
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; Wikipedia states he 'is of Curaçaoan descent' without per-parent detail.

players.name: Roshon van Eijma
players.note: Born in the Netherlands, listed among 'Dutch people of Curaçaoan descent'; no specific parental detail found.

players.name: Joshua Brenet
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; Wikipedia states he 'is of Curaçaoan descent' without per-parent detail.

players.name: Leandro Bacuna
players.note: Captain. Born in the Netherlands 'to parents of Afro-Curaçaoan descent'.

players.name: Juninho Bacuna
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; younger brother of Leandro Bacuna, sharing the same Afro-Curaçaoan parental heritage.

players.name: Godfried Roemeratoe
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; surname traces to Seram, Maluku Islands, Indonesia, reported as being 'of Indonesian (Moluccan) descent'; also categorized as of Curaçaoan descent on his mother's side (assumed).

players.name: Brandley Kuwas
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; Wikipedia states he 'is of Curaçaoan descent' without per-parent detail.

players.name: Kenji Gorré
players.note: Born in Spijkenisse, Netherlands, to Surinamese father Dean Gorré (former Dutch international footballer) and Curaçaoan mother Magali.

players.name: Jearl Margaritha
players.note: Born in the Netherlands; described only as 'eligible to play for Curaçao through his heritage', no specific parental detail, assumed Curaçaoan.
